sources.title: Pippi Longstocking Song Lyrics From 1969 Movie
sources.description: Pippi Longstocking Song Lyrics From 1969 Movie Astrid Lindgren

metadata.Plot: Pippi Longstocking, a child of incredible strength, moves by herself to a East-European town with her monkey, horse, and a bag full of gold coins. She befriends two children, Annika and Tommy, shocks the adults of the town, defends herself from bandits, and has a reunion with her seafaring father.
metadata.Actors: Inger Nilsson, Maria Persson, Pär Sundberg
